message:
fix(incremental): use PID-stable identity hash and add no-mock tests

The previous identity hash used start_id which jitters between scans
due to integer truncation of timing fields. Changed to pid+uid+comm+cmd
which is stable across quick_scan invocations within a session.

Added 3 new tests:
- nomock_incremental_with_real_quick_scan: exercises engine with live ps data
- nomock_identity_hash_matches_shadow: verifies hash properties on real procs
- identity_hash_same_pid_same_cmd_is_stable: verifies start_id independence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
